search_query: how to start a YouTube channel
retrieved_result: How Many Calories are in the Alcohol You Like to Drink? With 7 calories per gram, the number of calories in alcohol is second only after fat (9 cals/g). The calories in alcohol are metabolised first by the body, ahead of burning fat – which is not desirable if on a weight loss diet. For more information on how alcohol affects weight loss click here. Scro
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result is about calories in alcoholic drinks, not about starting a YouTube channel.
